problem id: 75898981
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  01011101 -> 11010001
  10110011 -> 00110010
  01101111 -> 11110001
  01011010 -> 10100001
  01111110 -> 11100001
  01000001 -> 00010001
  10001001 -> 10010010
  10011001 -> 10010010
  01110110 -> 01100001

query: 10001110
predicted answer: 11100010
